type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Asbestos waste received on-site is as a result of demolition and/or repair operations. Contractors responsible for the demolition/repair operations properly contain the waste according to regulatory requirements and dispose of the waste in sealed bags at the landfill site. During demolition/repairs, asbestos may become dislodged from piping or other materials and is therefore considered to be in friable form. It is estimated that approximately 10% of the waste is friable asbestos.

comments.comment: Reclaimed soil is received and disposed of at the landfill site. Soil analysis is done on random loads throughout the year. Based on the soil analysis results for 2021, Part B substances including Arsenic, Cadmium, Cobalt, and Lead are required to be reported.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
- 15% less precipitation in 2022
- Difference in Emission Factors used (RWDI used 56% higher EFs based on updated info). 
- Additionally, RWDI used updated Flare Emission rates from 2014 ESDM whereas in the past older data from 2010 ESDM was used.
